description_long: This object is a long, slender shotgun with a traditional design, featuring a straight barrel and a full stock. The barrel is cylindrical and extends the majority of the object's length, with no visible ribbing or venting along its top. The stock is solid and tapers smoothly into the receiver, providing a comfortable shoulder rest. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses the trigger, which is positioned just ahead of the stock. The overall finish appears dark, likely a matte or blued metal, with a consistent coloration throughout. There are no visible external mechanisms such as a pump, lever, or magazine tube.
description: A long, dark shotgun with a straight barrel and full stock, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a smooth, traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the straight barrel, full stock, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full length and stock from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the end of the stock and the slim, elongated shape of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement
